----
description: 'General guidelines for contributing to the project'
applyTo: '**/*'
----

# General Contribution Guidelines

## General Instructions
- When modifying existing code, always respond to the user with a rationale for changes, why do it? why is it better?, especially if they involve refactoring or changing existing logic.


## Tech stack

### Frontend
- The frontend is built using React with TypeScript.
- Marked up with Tailwind CSS for styling.
- Vite is used as the build tool and development server.

### Backend
- The backend is built using Java with Spring Boot.
- Maven is used for dependency management and build automation.
- Utilizes Java 25 Temurin features and best practices.
- Build to deploy with Docker
